description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The structure is composed of several rectangular volumes, with large, open entryways supported by columns and a few strategically placed windows. The exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, with sparse landscaping including several palm trees and a small garden area. The main entrance is defined by a wide, open portico with double columns, while the rear and sides have fewer openings and a more private appearance. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, emphasizing horizontal space and open courtyards. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, open entryways, and minimalist landscaping, surrounded by a low wall and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double columns, a wide portico, and several palm trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boundary wall, a smaller entryway, and a visible garden area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a flat roof, and a more private, enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a secondary entrance, vertical window strips, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large openings
attribute_entryway_design: Wide open portico with double columns, no steps, and minimalist detailing
